name: EMPTY_ROOM
description: A quiet, uneventful room… or so it seems. Nothing of value is found, and stamina is wasted.

name: DEAD_END
description: A hard stop. This channel is temporarily blacklisted and cannot be explored further.

name: LOCKED_ROOM
description: A locked door blocks the path. Keys can be found in channels within the same category. Return with one to proceed.

name: SECRET_ROOM
description: A hidden chamber discovered by chance. It can only be entered once; the channel becomes sealed afterward.

name: COLLAPSING_TUNNEL
description: The tunnel collapses, stunning the player for a few minutes and dealing minor damage. Explore again to continue.

name: MATCHPIECES
description: A puzzle of matching pieces or buttons. Solve it correctly to earn rewards.

name: LEVER
description: A solitary lever awaits. Pulling it may help—or unleash something unexpected.

name: PRESSURE_PLATE
description: A pressure plate clicks beneath the player’s foot, potentially triggering hazards or summoning enemies.

name: TRIPWIRE
description: A thin wire snaps. The player becomes crippled, unable to flee battles and less able to avoid traps.

name: SAWS
description: Rotating saws swing into action. Quick reactions are required to avoid taking damage.

name: CHOICE_DOOR
description: Several doors stand before the player. Choosing one will determine the next destination.

name: BOULDER
description: A massive boulder rushes forward. The player must run or risk getting crushed.

name: ENCHANTED_DOOR
description: A magical door sealed by arcane words. Input the correct code to open it.

name: SHARD
description: A crystal guardian awakens. The player must risk fleeing or suffer its attack.

name: GRAVEYARD
description: A cursed graveyard. Disturbing the gravestones may cause spirits to haunt the player.

name: ALTAR
description: A sacred altar. Offer something valuable to receive a blessing.

name: FOUNTAIN_OF_YOUTH
description: A rejuvenating fountain. Drinking from it restores health or energy.

name: EMPTY_FOUNTAIN
description: A dried-up fountain offering nothing. Stamina spent for no gain.

name: FOUNTAIN_OF_KNOWLEDGE
description: A mystical fountain that reveals all room types on the current floor (category).

name: FOUNTAIN_OF_SIRENS
description: A hauntingly beautiful fountain inhabited by sirens. Their charm disrupts continuous attacks.

name: FOUNTAIN_OF_CLEANSING
description: A purifying spring capable of removing curses, cleansing items, and lifting debuffs.

name: WORKBENCH
description: A crafting station where items can be created, dismantled for parts, or repaired.

name: MARKET
description: A stable shop. The player can return anytime to purchase goods.

name: TRAVELING_MERCHANT
description: A wandering merchant. Leaving or exploring again makes the merchant disappear and reveals a new room.

name: DEN_OF_THIEVES
description: A hidden den full of thieves eager to steal supplies.

name: MONSTER
description: A monster appears. Defeating it may yield loot, ingredients, or the chance to tame it as a companion.

name: ELITE
description: A powerful foe blocks the path. The player may choose to fight or flee.

name: MINI_BOSS
description: A formidable mini-boss stands in the way. Fleeing is not an option.

name: BOSS
description: A major boss encounter. Victory leads to powerful rewards.

name: CAMP
description: A safe camp. Resting here is far safer than usual.

name: SPIKES
description: Hidden spikes strike the player, causing immediate damage.

name: COLLAPSING_ROOM
description: The room begins to collapse. Escape quickly or get crushed. Success blacklists the entire floor.

name: ANCIENT_LIBRARY
description: A vast library of forgotten knowledge. Players can train or inscribe new spells here.

name: SUBMERGED_ROOM
description: A flooded chamber. Treasure lies within, but only agile players can reach it safely.

name: BLACKMARKET
description: A secretive black market that trades in an alternative currency.

name: FRIENDLY_CREATURE
description: A harmless creature that may be tamed to become a companion.

name: TREASURE_CHEST
description: A chest sits in the room. Open it cautiously—it may be a mimic.

name: GOLD_PILE
description: A shimmering pile of gold. Tempting to pick up… but sometimes risky.

name: ARMORY
description: A room stocked with weapons and armor, waiting to be claimed.

name: HAUNTED_ARMOR
description: A set of armor animated by a vengeful spirit. Defeat it to claim its gear.

name: RATIONS
description: Food rations left behind. Useful for survival.

name: LOST_ITEM
description: An item dropped by a previous adventurer. Valuable—unless cursed.

name: SUMMONING_CIRCLE
description: A ritual circle. It can summon a fallen companion or call forth an enemy.

name: STATUE
description: A towering statue of an ancient hero, deity, or creature.

name: SWARM
description: The room teems with aggressive creatures attacking in numbers.

name: RUINS
description: Crumbling remnants of a forgotten structure, rich with history but offering no interactions.

name: VEGETATION_PATCH
description: A patch of vegetation perfect for gathering herbs or ingredients.

name: CORPSE
description: A dead body lies on the ground. It may hold loot, but disturbing it risks a curse.

name: FOSSIL_REMAINS
description: Massive fossilized bones or ancient creatures embedded in the stone.

name: MURAL
description: Walls adorned with ancient paintings or symbolic imagery.

name: SHRINE
description: A quiet shrine where players can ask for blessings or guidance.

name: PORTAL
description: A shimmering portal linking to a random previously visited channel. If found first in a run, it remains inactive until another portal is discovered.

name: UNDERGROUND_WATERFALL
description: A serene underground waterfall cascading into a crystal-clear pool.

name: BLEEDING_WALLS
description: The walls seep with blood, creating an unsettling atmosphere.
